title: George Municipality main building to close early for fumigation
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Normal operations will resume on Monday, 9 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - George Municipality's main building will close early this Friday, 6 February, to allow for scheduled fumigation of the premises.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - George Municipality's main building will close early this Friday, 6 February, to allow for scheduled fumigation of the premises."},{"type":"heading","text":"Closure times are as follows:","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cashiers: close at 15:00All other public access areas: close at 15:30","html":"
  • Cashiers: close at 15:00
  • All other public access areas: close at 15:30
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The temporary closure is necessary to ensure a safe and healthy working environment for staff and members of the public. Normal operations will resume on Monday, 9 February.","html":"The temporary closure is necessary to ensure a safe and healthy working environment for staff and members of the public. Normal operations will resume on Monday, 9 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Municipality apologises for any inconvenience caused and thanks the public for their understanding.","html":"The Municipality apologises for any inconvenience caused and thanks the public for their understanding."}]
